title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies gaps, and synthesizes them into a stronger unified response. A budget Fusion setup achieved near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at approximately half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies gaps, and synthesizes them into one unified answer. It frames Fusion as an ensemble approach to evidence synthesis rather than reliance on a single model. The key takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration reached near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
